summary: Complete testing of bug fixes for municipal management application. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright automation. Year selector appears correctly in Portal Público Processos page, Portaria 448 classification codes are working, process creation with all fields (secretaria, secretario, responsavel) is saving correctly, and /portal-publico route is functional.

issues: 'Processos por Status' chart appears blank/empty - may need data or rendering issue

seed_data_creation: Created test processo during tests (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: (1) Year selector in Portal Público Processos page is working with data-testid='processos-ano-selector', (2) Process creation saves all fields correctly (secretaria, secretario, responsavel), (3) Portaria 448 classification codes are present in /api/classificacao/codigos, (4) /portal-publico route is working. One minor issue: 'Processos por Status' chart on dashboard appears blank but this may be a data issue rather than a bug.
